description: GOM / POI Authoring — authors and maintains the General Operations Manual with revision tracking and POI submission management

hard_stops.label: GOM Missing Required Section
hard_stops.logic: GOM is missing one or more sections required by 14 CFR 135.23 — cannot submit to FSDO

hard_stops.label: Revision Not Distributed
hard_stops.logic: Approved GOM revision has not been distributed to all required manual holders per 14 CFR 135.21(b)

hard_stops.label: POI Rejection Unresolved
hard_stops.logic: POI rejected a GOM revision and the discrepancies have not been resolved

soft_flags.label: GOM Review Overdue
soft_flags.logic: GOM has not been reviewed in over 12 months

soft_flags.label: OpSpec Change Not Reflected
soft_flags.logic: An OpSpec amendment was approved but the corresponding GOM section has not been updated

soft_flags.label: Procedure Inconsistency Detected
soft_flags.logic: A GOM procedure conflicts with or contradicts another section of the manual
